# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

LABEL maintainer="devteam@example.com"
LABEL description="All-in-one development container with web server, API server, PostgreSQL, and Redis"

RUN groupadd -r appgroup && \
    useradd -r -g appgroup -m -s /bin/bash appuser

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        nginx \
        nodejs \
        npm \
        postgresql \
        postgresql-contrib \
        redis-server \
        supervisor \
        curl \
        ca-certificates \
        gosu \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* /tmp/* /var/tmp/*

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor \
    && mkdir -p /var/run/postgresql \
    && mkdir -p /var/run/redis \
    && mkdir -p /app/api \
    && mkdir -p /app/web \
    && mkdir -p /var/lib/postgresql/data \
    && mkdir -p /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d

RUN chown -R postgres:postgres /var/run/postgresql /var/lib/postgresql \
    && chown -R redis:redis /var/run/redis \
    && chown -R www-data:www-data /app/web \
    && chown -R appuser:appgroup /app/api \
    && chmod 750 /var/lib/postgresql/data

COPY --chown=www-data:www-data web/ /app/web/
COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup api/ /app/api/

RUN rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default

RUN cat > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name _;
    root /app/web;
    index index.html;

    server_tokens off;

    add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
    add_header X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" always;
    add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;
    add_header Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" always;

    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
    }

    location /api/ {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8080/;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}
EOF

RUN ln -sf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default

RUN cat > /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf <<'EOF'
bind 127.0.0.1
port 6379
protected-mode yes
requirepass devredispassword
maxmemory 256mb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
rename-command FLUSHALL ""
rename-command FLUSHDB ""
rename-command DEBUG ""
dir /var/lib/redis
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-server.log
EOF

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/redis && chown redis:redis /var/log/redis

RUN cat > /etc/postgresql-custom-hba.conf <<'EOF'
local   all             postgres                                peer
local   all             all                                     md5
host    all             all             127.0.0.1/32            md5
host    all             all             ::1/128                 md5
EOF

WORKDIR /app/api
RUN if [ -f package.json ]; then npm ci --only=production; fi

RUN cat > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf <<'EOF'
[supervisord]
nodaemon=true
user=root
logfile=/var/log/supervisor/supervisord.log
pidfile=/var/run/supervisord.pid
childlogdir=/var/log/supervisor

[program:postgresql]
command=gosu postgres /usr/lib/postgresql/14/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/14/main -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/14/main/postgresql.conf
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=10
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgresql-stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgresql-stderr.log
user=root

[program:redis]
command=gosu redis redis-server /etc/redis/redis-custom.conf
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=20
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis-stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis-stderr.log
user=root

[program:api]
command=gosu appuser node /app/api/server.js
directory=/app/api
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=30
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api-stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api-stderr.log
user=root
environment=NODE_ENV="development",PORT="8080",DB_HOST="127.0.0.1",DB_PORT="5432",REDIS_HOST="127.0.0.1",REDIS_PORT="6379"

[program:nginx]
command=nginx -g "daemon off;"
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=40
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx-stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx-stderr.log
user=root
EOF

COPY <<'ENTRYPOINT_SCRIPT' /docker-entrypoint.sh
#!/bin/bash
set -e

PG_VERSION=14
PG_DATA="/var/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/main"

if [ ! -f "${PG_DATA}/PG_VERSION" ]; then
    echo "Initializing PostgreSQL database..."
    gosu postgres /usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/bin/initdb -D "${PG_DATA}" --auth-local=peer --auth-host=md5
    
    cp /etc/postgresql-custom-hba.conf "${PG_DATA}/pg_hba.conf"
    chown postgres:postgres "${PG_DATA}/pg_hba.conf"
    
    echo "listen_addresses = '127.0.0.1'" >> "${PG_DATA}/postgresql.conf"
    echo "port = 5432" >> "${PG_DATA}/postgresql.conf"
    echo "log_connections = on" >> "${PG_DATA}/postgresql.conf"
    echo "log_disconnections = on" >> "${PG_DATA}/postgresql.conf"
    
    gosu postgres /usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/bin/pg_ctl -D "${PG_DATA}" -w start
    
    gosu postgres psql -c "CREATE USER appuser WITH PASSWORD 'devdbpassword';"
    gosu postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE appdb OWNER appuser;"
    gosu postgres psql -c "REVOKE ALL ON DATABASE postgres FROM PUBLIC;"
    
    for f in /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/*; do
        case "$f" in
            *.sql)    echo "Running $f"; gosu postgres psql -d appdb -f "$f" ;;
            *.sql.gz) echo "Running $f"; gunzip -c "$f" | gosu postgres psql -d appdb ;;
        esac
    done
    
    gosu postgres /usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/bin/pg_ctl -D "${PG_DATA}" -w stop
fi

mkdir -p /etc/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/main
if [ ! -f /etc/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/main/postgresql.conf ]; then
    cp "${PG_DATA}/postgresql.conf" /etc/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/main/postgresql.conf
fi

exec /usr/bin/supervisord -c /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
ENTRYPOINT_SCRIPT

RUN chmod 755 /docker-entrypoint.sh

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://127.0.0.1:80/ > /dev/null 2>&1 && \
        curl -f http://127.0.0.1:8080/health > /dev/null 2>&1 && \
        gosu postgres pg_isready -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 > /dev/null 2>&1 && \
        redis-cli -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6379 -a devredispassword ping > /dev/null 2>&1 \
    || exit 1

EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379

VOLUME ["/var/lib/postgresql/data", "/app/api", "/app/web"]

ENTRYPOINT ["/docker-entrypoint.sh"]
